label: Under construction
summary: The permanently-temporary under-construction sign: a yellow board between caution bars.
era: The digging-worker barricade GIF that lived on every homepage, forever unfinished.

classes.name: rs-construction
classes.role: the sign: caution-striped bars around a yellow text board

classes.name: rs-construction--bar
classes.role: modifier: just the striped barrier, no text

a11y: Ordinary text in a block; the caution stripes are decorative pseudo-elements. Say what's under construction in the text.
